subject: Update VID's k8s-mariadb-galera-centos image to latest
commit_message:
Update VID's k8s-mariadb-galera-centos image to latest

Issue-ID: VID-438

Change-Id: I0827c625406523b00770f32de7eac68971b093ea
Signed-off-by: Ittay Stern <ittay.stern@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Verified the change:
